svg.font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

text.font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Only what nature grew comes down. Three checks separate a wild tree from anything a player has touched.

text.font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Wild leaves attached, not one placed log,

text.font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: A placed log or an attached block

text.font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: keeps every log exactly where it is.

text.font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: A cluster with none reads as a build.

text.font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Every hand placed log is remembered

text.font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: per chunk. One is enough to protect.

text.font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: or glass on the logs mark a structure.

text.font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Fell only when all three agree: natural leaves present, no placed logs, and no attached structure.
